# agent.opensverige — AI Readiness Scanner

> Free, open-source tool that scans any website and reports how ready it is for AI agents. Built for Swedish businesses and developers.

## What it does

agent.opensverige scans a domain and checks 11 criteria across three categories:

**Discovery** — Can AI agents find and index the site?
- robots.txt allows AI crawlers (GPTBot, ClaudeBot, PerplexityBot, etc.)
- sitemap.xml exists and is accessible
- llms.txt file present for AI-readable site description

**Compliance** — Does the site meet EU/Swedish regulatory expectations?
- Privacy automation (GDPR-compliant data processing)
- Cookie and bot handling
- AI-generated content marking (EU AI Act transparency)

**Builder** — Can developers build AI integrations on top of the site?
- Public API exists
- OpenAPI specification available
- API documentation accessible
- MCP (Model Context Protocol) server
- Sandbox/test environment available

## Score and badge

Each scan produces a score out of 11 and a badge:
- 9-11: AI-Ready (green)
- 6-8: Partial (amber)
- 0-5: Not ready (red)

## Pages

- Scanner: https://agent.opensverige.se/scan
- API docs: https://agent.opensverige.se/api-docs
- MCP integration: https://agent.opensverige.se/mcp

## Part of opensverige

agent.opensverige is a tool by opensverige — Sweden's open community for AI agent builders.
- Community: https://opensverige.se
- Discord: https://discord.gg/CSphbTk8En
- Contact: info@opensverige.se
